rationale: Educ. Code §22.005 governs school district employee health care plans and funds. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b); no overlap or conflict exists.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district may establish a health care plan for employees of the district and dependents of employees.
_note: Rule text concerns health care plans, not property tax exemptions. No conflict identified.
